name: takpack-studio
description: Build ATAK data packages: offline imagery (GeoPackage), CoT annotations, KML overlays, and map-source XML from open or API-keyed imagery sources.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=server & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend
